# Prompt Files

Prompt files in this directory are reusable slash commands for common workflows.

## Included prompts

- `plan-change.prompt.md` - build an implementation plan.
- `implement-backend.prompt.md` - execute backend changes.
- `implement-frontend.prompt.md` - execute frontend changes.
- `qa-gate.prompt.md` - run validation gate.
- `full-delivery.prompt.md` - orchestrate end-to-end workflow.
- `create-instruction-file.prompt.md` - generate a new scoped `.instructions.md` file.

## Usage

In Copilot Chat, type `/` and select one of the prompt names.
